name: Leif Johnson Ford of Buda
description: Welcome to Leif Johnson Ford of Buda, your trusted Ford dealer in the Buda and South Austin area. We offer a diverse selection of new Ford vehicles like the F-150, Explorer, and Bronco, alongside a robust inventory of certified pre-owned and used cars. Our Buda dealership is dedicated to providing a transparent, haggle-free shopping experience. Whether you need expert Ford service from factory-trained technicians or flexible financing options, our team is here to help you get moving in your dream vehicle. Visit us right across I-35 from Cabela's!

openingHoursSpecification.description: Mon: 8:30am-8:00pm, Tue: 8:30am-8:00pm, Wed: 8:30am-8:00pm, Thu: 8:30am-8:00pm, Fri: 8:30am-7:00pm, Sat: 8:30am-7:00pm, Sun: Closed
